metadata.name: test
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: An invasion threatens the realm. Forge powerful weapons from artifacts hidden in treacherous dungeons and deliver them to the armory in Larkport.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Larkport
towns.description: A bustling market town where traders from distant lands hawk exotic wares.

key_dungeons.name: Crimson Tunnels
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Crimson Tunnels. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Descend into Crimson Tunnels and find the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The passage grows more treacherous with every floor.
